name: Flaviane Mesquita

handling.tone: Bilingual EN/PT — switch to Portuguese where it lands more naturally; she engaged in mixed language. Brazilian wedding cultural fit is our home court.
handling.voice_adjustments: Andre voice: short, lowercase, mix Portuguese phrases. The .com.br email is dead — only iCloud works. SMS-first.
handling.context: Discovery call Apr 15 went well — walked the full Brazilian menu in PT (churrasco, picanha, mandioca, caipirinhas). Missed Apr 19 tasting. Email bounce on .com.br address — keep everything on iCloud + SMS.

context_anchors: Brazilian wedding — full bar with caipirinhas, churrasco core
Email bounce: fcmesquita@bol.com.br is dead — iCloud only
Tasting miss: Apr 19 no-show, no explanation
Bilingual fluent — comfortable in PT and EN

lead.source: Crisp Chat / Instagram + FB Lead Ad (DOM'S FACELESS)
lead.next_move: Bilingual SMS locking May 17 tasting + confirming iCloud as working email

enrichment.identity_notes: Unambiguously Brazilian — first and surname Portuguese-Brazilian. .com.br email confirms Brazilian roots; iCloud is US-active. Active bilingual communicator.
win_angles: Bilingual fluency — switch to Portuguese where natural
Brazilian wedding cultural authenticity — churrasco, picanha, mandioca, caipirinhas
Reframe Apr 19 miss as 'May 17 was the better date anyway'
nepq_openers: PT: 'Oi Flaviane — vi que um dos seus emails está com problema. Vou confirmar tudo no iCloud daqui pra frente. Quer que eu te guarde uma vaga na degustação de 17 de maio às 14h em Fitchburg?'
EN: 'Hey Flaviane — looks like one of your emails is bouncing. I'll keep everything on the iCloud one. Want me to hold May 17 tasting at 2 PM?'
Anchor: 'For 50 guests with full churrasco + bar + service, looking at $X-Y. Want me to send a tight quote to your iCloud this week?'
enrichment.strategic_note: Strong Probably for a reason — discovery went well, cuisine fit is perfect. Only blocker is logistical. One bilingual SMS that locks May 17, confirms iCloud, acknowledges miss without making it big. Don't email broken address again — that's how leads quietly drift away.

comms.summary: 6-min discovery — full Brazilian menu walked, tasting invited
iCloud email shared; confirmed late-July/August window, ~50 people
Two email bounces from bol.com.br server
Day-4 cadence — what's left to figure out?

notes: Email bounce + tasting miss = pivot to SMS as primary channel
Brazilian wedding cultural fit is the deal's natural close
Once May 17 tasting locked, deal is on glide path
